heading: Discrimination
label: 12132 Discrimination
text: Subject to the provisions of this subchapter, no qualified individual with a disability shall, by reason of such disability, be excluded from participation in or be denied the benefits of the services, programs, or activities of a public entity, or be subjected to discrimination by any such entity.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 18 months after , see , set out as a note under .July 26, 1990section 205(a) of Pub. L. 101–336section 12131 of this title
